message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from london liverpool street and should leave on sunday
The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 16:00
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 6 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should be in the east
The hotel should include free wifi
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 2 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
